answers: Gina Petrone, President of the Association
No Proxy, I will be in attendance
question: Designated Proxy: I certify that I am an Owner assigned the PIN attached to this proxy and I give the person designated below (my proxy) (Gina Petrone, President of the Association, if left blank) permission to vote for me at the Annual Meeting.  My proxy may vote for me as if I were personally present at the meeting. I hereby specifically instruct my proxy to cast my vote in the manner indicated herein.

Should the 2027 Annual Budget for the Association be required to fully fund the Non-SIRS Reserves as permitted by Section 718.112(2)(f), Florida Statutes in the amount to be determined in the Proposed Budget?

Should the 2027 Annual Budget for the Association be required to partially fund the Non-SIRS Reserves as permitted by Section 718.112(2)(f), Florida Statutes in the amount to be determined in the Proposed Budget?
Are you in favor of having the option of rolling over the 2026 Operating account surplus funds, if any, to the Reserve account or maintaining it in the Operating account?
